channel.title: GitHub Makefile Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Makefile in GitHub

item.title: foostan/crkbd
item.description: Corne keyboard, a split keyboard with 3x6 column staggered keys and 3 thumb keys.

item.title: raspberrypi/noobs
item.description: NOOBS (New Out Of Box Software) - An easy Operating System install manager for the Raspberry Pi

item.title: openwrt/packages
item.description: Community maintained packages for OpenWrt. Documentation for submitting pull requests is in CONTRIBUTING.md

item.title: jobbole/awesome-python-cn
item.description: Python资源大全中文版，包括：Web框架、网络爬虫、模板引擎、数据库、数据可视化、图片处理等，由「开源前哨」和「Python开发者」微信公号团队维护更新。

item.title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-proto-go
item.description: Generated code for OpenTelemetry protobuf data model

item.title: PartialVolume/shredos.x86_64
item.description: Shredos Disk Eraser 64 bit for all Intel 64 bit processors as well as processors from AMD and other vendors which make compatible 64 bit chips. ShredOS - Secure disk erasure/wipe

item.title: cncf/people
item.description: Stores the data that will populate the various people listings on cncf.io

item.title: richfelker/musl-cross-make
item.description: Simple makefile-based build for musl cross compiler

item.title: motioneye-project/motioneyeos
item.description: A Video Surveillance OS For Single-board Computers

item.title: moul/http2curl
item.description: 📐 Convert Golang's http.Request to CURL command line

item.title: yuk7/ArchWSL
item.description: ArchLinux based WSL Distribution. Supports multiple install.

item.title: reportportal/reportportal
item.description: Main Repository. ReportPortal starts here - see readme below.
